UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores basic user profile information, created on sign-up.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and password resets.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

isLive.description: Indicates if the user's account is active. If false, the user sees a 'validity expired' message.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrative privileges.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client whose services are being tracked by the ClientTrack application. This entity stores core client information, subscription details, and payment status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

name.description: The full name of the client.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the client, used for communication.

market.description: The market segment the client belongs to (e.g., INDIAN, FOREX, BROKER).

fee.description: The service fee charged to the client.

subscriptionStartDate.description: The date when the client's current subscription started.

subscriptionEndDate.description: The date when the client's current subscription is set to end.

paymentStatus.description: The current payment status of the client's subscription.

totalPaid.description: The cumulative total amount paid by the client across all payments.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was first created.

deleted.description: A flag indicating whether the client record has been soft-deleted and moved to the recycle bin.

deletedAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was soft-deleted.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records individual payment transactions made by a client, detailing the amount, date, and validity period covered by each payment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this payment record, used for security rules.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client who made this payment. (Relationship: Client 1:N Payment)

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the payment was recorded.

amount.description: The monetary amount of this specific payment.

validityDays.description: The number of days of service validity this payment covers.

startDate.description: The effective start date of the subscription period covered by this payment.

endDate.description: The effective end date of the subscription period covered by this payment.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Stores application-wide configuration settings, such as WhatsApp message templates, to centralize and easily manage configurable parameters.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Settings entity. Expected to be a singular document, e.g., 'whatsapp_template'.

whatsappTemplate.description: The template string for generating WhatsApp messages, supporting variables like {{name}}, {{market}}, {{fee}}, and {{expiry_date}}.

definition.description: Stores profile information for each application user.
Contains core information for each client, scoped to a specific user.
Records individual payment transactions associated with a specific client, under a specific user.
Stores application-wide configuration settings for a specific user.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to support multi-tenancy by scoping all major data collections (clients, payments, settings) under a top-level 'users' collection. This ensures that each user's data is isolated and can be secured with Firestore rules.
